name: Grilled Peaches and Berries
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the peaches thoroughly and peel them. Cut each peach in half and remove the pit.
2. Place each peach half on a double thickness of heavy-duty aluminum foil.
3. Fill the peach halves generously with fresh or frozen blueberries.
4. Sprinkle 2 teaspoons of brown sugar and 1 teaspoon of lemon juice over each peach half.
5. Wrap the foil securely around the peach halves, making sure no edges are exposed.
6. Place the wrapped peaches on the grill and cook for 18-20 minutes, turning them once halfway through the cooking time.
7. Serve the grilled peaches right out of the foil.
Note: You can also bake the prepared peaches in a dish covered with foil or glass at 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius) for about 15 minutes until the peaches are tender. Allow for approximately half a peach per serving.
